raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Bauer-Kahan's number one priority this year is creating a robust regulatory framework for Artificial Intelligence (AI).",
    "All algorithmic decision-making will be required to be proven unbiased before it makes consequential decisions about Californians' lives.",
    "Algorithms are embedding discrimination further into our system.",
    "AB 1836 seeks to ensure that generative AI does not exploit deceased persons' intellectual property.",
    "AB 2885 will create a standard definition for AI in state law.",
    "AB 3204 requires all data-trained models sold in California to register with the state.",
    "The package of AI legislation aims to create a nation-leading regulatory framework where AI tools are tracked and understood."
  ]
}
```
